creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I am closing this PR, because I believe the correct solution is 
to repocopy the CI ports like so: 

www/codeigniter       -> www/codeigniter17 
www/codeigniter-devel -> www/codeigniter 

The 1.7.x branch is still available for download, and until it is 
unsupported, I will continue to monitor it and update the port with 
security fixes.  The 2.0.x port can continue with updates from the 
active development branch under your guidance. 

If you like the repocopy idea, let me know and I'll start that process.
